KidOS MVP - Observer Agent Tests ================================== High prior
High tap latency + many back buttons → frustration HIGH, engagement 35.
Low tap latency + low error rate → engagement HIGH.
Verify session state is maintained across calls.
KidOS MVP - Orchestrator Agent Tests ======================================= H
Level 1 academic tier → simplified teaching agent.
Session > 10 min AND engagement > 70 → recommender agent.
High cognitive risk → safety fallback (from IBLM_v2 Governor).
KidOS MVP - Recommender Agent Tests ======================================= Te
Completed topic + high engagement → advance to next topic.
Brand new child → gets a beginner default topic.
Every 4th suggestion should be a challenge topic.
